basic_details.job_title: OPTCL Trainee Exam Date 2026 Out - Check Exam Schedule & Admit Card
basic_details.short_information: OPTCL Exam Date 2026: The Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited (OPTCL) has officially released the exam date for the Trainee recruitment. Candidates who have applied for the Management Trainee, Junior Management Trainee, and Office Assistant Grade III Trainee posts can check the complete exam schedule below. The examination is scheduled to be held on 29th and 30th June 2026. All eligible candidates are advised to download their admit cards and prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q1. When is the OPTCL Trainee exam scheduled for 2026?
faq.answer: The examination is scheduled to be held on 29th and 30th June 2026. Candidates can check the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the OPTCL exam date notification?
faq.answer: You can download the notification from the official website optcl.co.in or use links in Current Openings section.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any change in the OPTCL exam date 2026?
faq.answer: As per the latest notification, the exam is scheduled for 29th-30th June 2026. Any changes will be updated on the official website.

faq.question: Q4. When will the OPTCL admit card be released?
faq.answer: The admit card is expected to be released before the examination date. Keep checking the official website regularly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the exam mode for OPTCL Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: The examination will be conducted in Computer Based Test (Online) mode.
